title: Seizure follow-up

red_flags.text: Supports documentation of seizure clusters or convulsive emergencies and a clinician-agreed individual emergency management plan without mapping emergency medication or doses.
red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped cluster or convulsive-emergency and individual emergency-plan fields.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports documentation of seizure clusters or convulsive emergencies and a clinician-agreed individual emergency management plan without mapping emergency medication or doses.

examination.text: Supports seizure-event and witness history, physical examination, ECG or metabolic context, EEG review, MRI review, recurrence after remission, and specialist assessment.
examination.rationale: Supports mapped seizure-event, witness, aura, post-ictal, neurological, EEG, MRI, and specialist-referral fields.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports seizure-event and witness history, physical examination, ECG or metabolic context, EEG review, MRI review, recurrence after remission, and specialist assessment.

source_limitations: Detailed cranial-nerve, gait, blood-pressure, pulse, and cardiac examination prompts, broad blood tests, generic clinician plans, fixed review intervals, and PRN wording remain unsupported.
Medicine choice, numeric dose, emergency medicine, driving eligibility, and clinical interpretation remain clinician-stated.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
